AD_FIELD.NAME: Line ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transaction line ID (internal)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Internal link

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Line ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transaction line ID (internal)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Internal link

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date this transaction is recorded for in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Credit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Group ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Accounting entry group ID
AD_FIELD.HELP: Accounting entry group ID. Used to group a set of entries

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Group ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Accounting entry group ID
AD_FIELD.HELP: Accounting entry group ID. Used to group a set of entries

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Indirect Cost
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Any charge of doing business which cannot be directly allocated to production.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates an indirect cost.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Region
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of the world where sales efforts will be focused.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sales Region indicates a specific area of sales coverage.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posting Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct posting amount characteristic used for processes and sometimes grouped within a category.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Posting Type indicates the type of amount (Actual, Encumbrance, Budget) this journal updated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tax
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The percentage of money requested by the government for this specified product or transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Trx Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The organization which performs or initiates the transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization). The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location to Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location To indicates the location that a product was moved to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited to an account, converted to the organization default currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Account Debit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Schema
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cost UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The unit of measure associated with the cost located adjacent to this field.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Unit of Measure for cost

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Debit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Date Balanced
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Date on which an entry gets balanced
AD_FIELD.HELP: Used for certain accounts to set the date on which the account gets balance equal zero. This is used to exclude entries which are no longer open items. Useful to reduce number of entries to be reviewed

AD_FIELD.NAME: 1st Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Alert Status
AD_FIELD.HELP: Status of the alert: New: The alert has been created and has not been reviewed yet. Read: The alert has been reviewed and user is waiting to be solved. Solved: The alert has been solved and is not an issue any more. Exception: The alert has been acknowledged but not action is going to be made to solve it.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date this transaction is recorded for in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date this transaction is recorded for in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Trx Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The organization which performs or initiates the transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization). The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Group ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Accounting entry group ID
AD_FIELD.HELP: Accounting entry group ID. Used to group a set of entries

AD_FIELD.NAME: Alert Status
AD_FIELD.HELP: Status of the alert: New: The alert has been created and has not been reviewed yet. Read: The alert has been reviewed and user is waiting to be solved. Solved: The alert has been solved and is not an issue any more. Exception: The alert has been acknowledged but not action is going to be made to solve it.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Period
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Crear Presupuesto
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Si no marca el botón actualizar se creará una nueva cotización
AD_FIELD.HELP: Si no marca el botón actualizar se creará una nueva cotización

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Schema
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Date Balanced
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Date on which an entry gets balanced
AD_FIELD.HELP: Used for certain accounts to set the date on which the account gets balance equal zero. This is used to exclude entries which are no longer open items. Useful to reduce number of entries to be reviewed

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Asset
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item which is owned and exchangeable for cash.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Debit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quantity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Asset
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item which is owned and exchangeable for cash.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Invoice Line
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item or charge in an invoice.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Invoice Line uniquely identifies a single line of an Invoice.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Period
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Transaction Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date that a specified transaction is entered into the application.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Transaction Date indicates the date of the transaction.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Crear Presupuesto
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Si no marca el botón actualizar se creará una nueva cotización
AD_FIELD.HELP: Si no marca el botón actualizar se creará una nueva cotización

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tab
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An indication that a tab is displayed within a window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tab indicates a tab that displays within a window.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Table
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A dictionary table used for this tab that points to the database table.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Table indicates the table in which a field or fields reside.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Date Balanced
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Date on which an entry gets balanced
AD_FIELD.HELP: Used for certain accounts to set the date on which the account gets balance equal zero. This is used to exclude entries which are no longer open items. Useful to reduce number of entries to be reviewed

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Value of the account used in the entry.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Value of the account used in the entry.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Costcenter
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_FIELD.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location from Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent from.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location From indicates the location that a product was moved from.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Group ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Accounting entry group ID
AD_FIELD.HELP: Accounting entry group ID. Used to group a set of entries

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Phase
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a phase for a particular project.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Withholding
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Withholding
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Withholding indicates the type of withholding to be calculated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID 2
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Payment the fact refers to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Payment the fact refers to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Transaction Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date that a specified transaction is entered into the application.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Transaction Date indicates the date of the transaction.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Value of the account used in the entry.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Value of the account used in the entry.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Goods Shipment Line
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item, charge, or movement in a shipment.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Goods Shipment Line indicates a unique line in a Shipment document

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Campaign
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An advertising effort aimed at increasing sales.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program. Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign. You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Transaction Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date that a specified transaction is entered into the application.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Transaction Date indicates the date of the transaction.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Credit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: G/L Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification used to group lines in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Category is an optional, user defined method of grouping journal lines.

AD_FIELD.NAME: UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location from Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent from.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location From indicates the location that a product was moved from.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cost
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A charge related to conducting business.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Cost amount.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Withholding
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Withholding
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Withholding indicates the type of withholding to be calculated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Storage Bin
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A set of coordinates (x, y, z) which help locate an item in a warehouse.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Alert Status
AD_FIELD.HELP: Status of the alert: New: The alert has been created and has not been reviewed yet. Read: The alert has been reviewed and user is waiting to be solved. Solved: The alert has been solved and is not an issue any more. Exception: The alert has been acknowledged but not action is going to be made to solve it.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Withholding
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Withholding
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Withholding indicates the type of withholding to be calculated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Region
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of the world where sales efforts will be focused.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sales Region indicates a specific area of sales coverage.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tax
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The percentage of money requested by the government for this specified product or transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting entry Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Description of the accounting entry
AD_FIELD.HELP: Description of the accounting entry

AD_FIELD.NAME: Activity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct activity defined and used in activity based management.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

AD_FIELD.NAME: Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Credit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Account
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The identification code used for accounting.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The (natural) account used

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Debit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Line No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Campaign
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An advertising effort aimed at increasing sales.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program. Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign. You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tab
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An indication that a tab is displayed within a window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tab indicates a tab that displays within a window.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location to Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location To indicates the location that a product was moved to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posting Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct posting amount characteristic used for processes and sometimes grouped within a category.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Posting Type indicates the type of amount (Actual, Encumbrance, Budget) this journal updated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Alert Status
AD_FIELD.HELP: Status of the alert: New: The alert has been created and has not been reviewed yet. Read: The alert has been reviewed and user is waiting to be solved. Solved: The alert has been solved and is not an issue any more. Exception: The alert has been acknowledged but not action is going to be made to solve it.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Account
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The identification code used for accounting.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The (natural) account used

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Phase
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a phase for a particular project.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Costcenter
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_FIELD.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Line No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Activity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct activity defined and used in activity based management.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification of document types that are shown and processed in the same window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Base Type identifies the base or starting point for a document. Multiple document types may share a single document base type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posting Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct posting amount characteristic used for processes and sometimes grouped within a category.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Posting Type indicates the type of amount (Actual, Encumbrance, Budget) this journal updated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Schema
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Asset
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item which is owned and exchangeable for cash.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Table
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A dictionary table used for this tab that points to the database table.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Table indicates the table in which a field or fields reside.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Region
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of the world where sales efforts will be focused.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sales Region indicates a specific area of sales coverage.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quantity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Alert Status
AD_FIELD.HELP: Status of the alert: New: The alert has been created and has not been reviewed yet. Read: The alert has been reviewed and user is waiting to be solved. Solved: The alert has been solved and is not an issue any more. Exception: The alert has been acknowledged but not action is going to be made to solve it.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Activity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct activity defined and used in activity based management.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Schema
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Alert Status
AD_FIELD.HELP: Status of the alert: New: The alert has been created and has not been reviewed yet. Read: The alert has been reviewed and user is waiting to be solved. Solved: The alert has been solved and is not an issue any more. Exception: The alert has been acknowledged but not action is going to be made to solve it.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Trx Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The organization which performs or initiates the transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization). The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Activity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct activity defined and used in activity based management.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Ending Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A parameter stating the ending time range related for a specified request, query, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Date To indicates the end date of a range (inclusive)

AD_FIELD.NAME: Account
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The identification code used for accounting.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The (natural) account used

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_FIELD.NAME: Table
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A dictionary table used for this tab that points to the database table.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Table indicates the table in which a field or fields reside.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location to Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location To indicates the location that a product was moved to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 2nd Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Value of the account used in the entry.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Value of the account used in the entry.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Period
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Storage Bin
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A set of coordinates (x, y, z) which help locate an item in a warehouse.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 2nd Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Goods Shipment
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The document number for identifying an act of sending goods.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Shipment ID indicates the unique document for this shipment.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification of document types that are shown and processed in the same window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Base Type identifies the base or starting point for a document. Multiple document types may share a single document base type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited to an account, converted to the organization default currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Account Credit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cost UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The unit of measure associated with the cost located adjacent to this field.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Unit of Measure for cost

AD_FIELD.NAME: Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited to an account, converted to the organization default currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Account Debit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date this transaction is recorded for in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting entry Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Description of the accounting entry
AD_FIELD.HELP: Description of the accounting entry

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tab
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An indication that a tab is displayed within a window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tab indicates a tab that displays within a window.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID 2
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Payment the fact refers to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Payment the fact refers to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location to Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location To indicates the location that a product was moved to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 2nd Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Salary Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification of salaries based on similar characteristics or attributes.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates a salary category

AD_FIELD.NAME: Attribute Set
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A group of attributes which are assigned to a selected product.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Define Product Attribute Sets to add additional attributes and values to the product. You need to define a Attribute Set if you want to enable Serial and Lot Number tracking.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cost UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The unit of measure associated with the cost located adjacent to this field.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Unit of Measure for cost

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Phase
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies a phase for a particular project.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited to an account, converted to the organization default currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Account Credit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quantity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_FIELD.NAME: G/L Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification used to group lines in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Category is an optional, user defined method of grouping journal lines.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sequence Number
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The order of records in a specified document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sequence indicates the order of records

AD_FIELD.NAME: Costcenter
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_FIELD.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Asset
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item which is owned and exchangeable for cash.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification of document types that are shown and processed in the same window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Base Type identifies the base or starting point for a document. Multiple document types may share a single document base type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 1st Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID 2
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Payment the fact refers to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Payment the fact refers to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posted
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not.
AD_FIELD.HELP: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not. When doing the accounting manually this button can be used to post or unpost the transaction from the general ledger by hand.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quantity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting entry Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Description of the accounting entry
AD_FIELD.HELP: Description of the accounting entry

AD_FIELD.NAME: Line ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transaction line ID (internal)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Internal link

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 2nd Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cost
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A charge related to conducting business.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Cost amount.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Transaction Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date that a specified transaction is entered into the application.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Transaction Date indicates the date of the transaction.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: 1st Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Storage Bin
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A set of coordinates (x, y, z) which help locate an item in a warehouse.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited to an account, converted to the organization default currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Account Debit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tax
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The percentage of money requested by the government for this specified product or transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Value
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Value of the account used in the entry.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Value of the account used in the entry.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posting Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct posting amount characteristic used for processes and sometimes grouped within a category.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Posting Type indicates the type of amount (Actual, Encumbrance, Budget) this journal updated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Storage Bin
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A set of coordinates (x, y, z) which help locate an item in a warehouse.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Campaign
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An advertising effort aimed at increasing sales.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program. Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign. You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Table
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A dictionary table used for this tab that points to the database table.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Table indicates the table in which a field or fields reside.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Campaign
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An advertising effort aimed at increasing sales.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program. Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign. You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location from Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent from.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location From indicates the location that a product was moved from.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Costcenter
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_FIELD.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 1st Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Unit_Cost
AD_FIELD.HELP: Budgeted

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Region
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A defined section of the world where sales efforts will be focused.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sales Region indicates a specific area of sales coverage.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: G/L Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification used to group lines in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Category is an optional, user defined method of grouping journal lines.

AD_FIELD.NAME: G/L Item
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An alias for the Account Combination which can be commonly used in daily operations.
AD_FIELD.HELP: General ledger item.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID 2
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Payment the fact refers to.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Payment the fact refers to.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tax
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The percentage of money requested by the government for this specified product or transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Date Balanced
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Date on which an entry gets balanced
AD_FIELD.HELP: Used for certain accounts to set the date on which the account gets balance equal zero. This is used to exclude entries which are no longer open items. Useful to reduce number of entries to be reviewed

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_FIELD.NAME: UOM
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Trx Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The organization which performs or initiates the transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization). The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Machine
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A tool use to aid in or fully complete a task.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates a machine of the enterprise.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited to an account, converted to the organization default currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Account Credit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Period
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Location from Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where items are sent from.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Location From indicates the location that a product was moved from.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project Task
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A job to be carried out during the phase of a project.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Project Task in a Project Phase represents the actual work.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Withholding
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Withholding
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Withholding indicates the type of withholding to be calculated.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification of document types that are shown and processed in the same window.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Base Type identifies the base or starting point for a document. Multiple document types may share a single document base type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_FIELD.NAME: Record ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An record identifier in the dictionary.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Record ID is the internal unique identifier of a record

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Debit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount debited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Debit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Line ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transaction line ID (internal)
AD_FIELD.HELP: Internal link

AD_FIELD.NAME: G/L Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification used to group lines in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Category is an optional, user defined method of grouping journal lines.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting entry Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Description of the accounting entry
AD_FIELD.HELP: Description of the accounting entry

AD_FIELD.NAME: Foreign Currency Credit
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The amount credited from the account, given in provider currency.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Source Credit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Quantity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.
